subject: Walk every page in authed session
description: Screenshot and interact with dashboard, plan intelligence (contracts), disclosure, audit, compliance, + all orphaned pages

subject: Issue 7: Tests for validate round-trip
description: Create tests/test_validate_roundtrip.py with >=5 cases: fixture determinism (same seed -> same output), threshold pass, threshold fail, missing ONNX error, unsupported model type. Use monkeypatching/mock export dir to avoid loading real 3B-param checkpoints. Optional integration test gated by REFLEX_INTEGRATION=1 env var exercising a real SmolVLA export. Conformance: files_exist + tests command 'pytest tests/test_validate_roundtrip.py -v'. Wave 3 — depends on Issue 1, 2, 4, 5.
